---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the mod
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the gap or friction you're running into.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer this one.

**Additional context**
Mockups, references to similar features in other mods, or anything else
that helps explain the idea.
